title: senecio cephalophorus
intro: Senecio cephalophorus, also known as the Head and Shoulders Ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and expectorant qualities. The health benefits associated with Senecio cephalophorus include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and the risk of liver damage.
